Home / Services / Vinyl Flooring

Vinyl Flooring

Waterproof and stylish vinyl flooring solutions for kitchens and bathrooms.

Vinyl flooring is an excellent choice for areas prone to moisture, such as kitchens, bathrooms, and laundry rooms in Tucson homes. It's waterproof, durable, and easy to clean, making it a practical and stylish option. We offer a wide variety of vinyl flooring styles, including sheet vinyl, vinyl tile, and luxury vinyl plank (LVP). LVP is particularly popular for its realistic wood and stone looks and its ability to withstand heavy foot traffic. Our team provides expert installation services, ensuring a seamless and watertight finish. We pay close attention to subfloor preparation to prevent bubbling and warping. Whether you're looking for a budget-friendly option or a high-end luxury vinyl, we have the perfect solution for your needs.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation and Selection – Choose the perfect vinyl style and color for your space.
  2. 02 Step 2: Subfloor Preparation – Ensure a clean, level, and dry subfloor for optimal vinyl installation.
  3. 03 Step 3: Vinyl Installation – Precise installation with proper sealing for a waterproof and durable floor.
  4. 04 Step 4: Finishing Touches – Install baseboards and trim for a polished and professional look.

Benefits

  • Waterproof
  • Durable and Stain-Resistant
  • Easy to Clean and Maintain
  • Wide Variety of Styles

Frequently Asked Questions

Is vinyl flooring a good choice for bathrooms?

Yes, vinyl flooring is an excellent choice for bathrooms due to its waterproof properties and resistance to mold and mildew.

What is the difference between sheet vinyl and vinyl tile?

Sheet vinyl comes in large rolls, providing a seamless and waterproof surface. Vinyl tile comes in individual squares or planks, allowing for more design flexibility.

How do I clean vinyl flooring?

Use a damp mop with a mild detergent. Avoid using harsh chemicals or abrasive cleaners.
